auth.signup.title: Signup
auth.signup.headline: Create your account
auth.signup.blurb: Create your account to get started.
auth.signup.subtitle: Create an account to continue.
auth.signup.note: Use your details to create a student account. Guardian email is required for minors.
results.title: Your Results
results.subtitle: Career recommendations based on your responses
student.assessmentIntro.title: Assessment
student.assessmentIntro.subtitle: Understand your strengths, preferences, and aptitude.
student.assessmentIntro.body1: This assessment helps generate deterministic and explainable career recommendations based on your responses.
student.assessmentIntro.contextCard.desc: Adding a few details helps keep recommendations practical for you. You can skip this and update later anytime.
student.assessmentIntro.activeError: Couldn’t check saved progress right now. You can still start or resume if available.
student.assessmentIntro.expect.title: What to expect
student.assessmentIntro.expect.li1: Answer honestly — there are no right or wrong answers.
student.assessmentIntro.expect.li3: You can resume later (progress saving will be wired next).
student.assessmentIntro.privacy.title: Privacy & disclaimer
student.assessmentIntro.privacy.body: Your responses are used only to generate your recommendations and reports. This is a guidance tool and not a guaranteed predictor of outcomes.
student.assessmentIntro.note: Note: Start creates a real assessment id via backend. Resume uses the last saved snapshot.
pricing.note.noPaymentWiring: No backend payment wiring in this step — CTA routes to existing flows.
pricing.note.nextStep: Next step (later): connect Premium CTA to real checkout/payment and route to premium report pages.
pricing.premium.title: Premium
pricing.premium.subtitle: Deeper analytics + explainability
pricing.whatYouGet.title: What you get
pricing.whatYouGet.deterministic.title: Deterministic
pricing.whatYouGet.deterministic.desc: Recommendations come from controlled mappings and scoring — not random outputs.
